## What changed

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## How to test

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] Manual validation steps documented

## Screenshots (if UI changes)

Add screenshots or recordings.

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked related issue(s)
- [ ] Updated docs (README/CONTRIBUTING/etc.) when needed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data committed
